{{CargoOrgan
|name=Mega Motor Cortex
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10932
|idx=32
|description="Subject 15 has stabilized. Dopamine from the brain has increased twenty-fold. The subject took less than seven minutes to finish a marathon."
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=1250
|def=80
|atk=92
|rush=121
|gene1=In explorations, Dodge +3%
|gene2=During exploration, ignore enemy DEF +100
|gene3=In explorations, {race} ATK +20
|gene7=Snail Arena, ignore enemy DEF +1% (Awakened)
|}}
